name: Exôn Núxios - The Bold Huntress
description:
_

a independent military group focused solely on achieving its goals and a few other things we keep secret, don't we?

But seriously, who isn't like that, right? (Not me, XD)

With big changes come big crises. As a matter of fact, Utopias are non-existent and dull, but what's really interesting is the search for them.

_

After the beginning of it all, with Rígel “The Mind”, this only proved to be true. While the special and technological revolution was taking place, another, much bigger revolution, which promised to last forever, was emerging - the much-feared military-technological revolution.

_

Foundations, military groups and independent groups were springing up all over the world, fighting over who would get to the top first. Some betting that knowledge would take them far, others that war would, others that aid and cooperation would. Then you ask me: why? And I answer: who knows? Power? Resources? Materials or research? Maybe a bit of everything?

It doesn't matter, but what we do know is that nobody (at least in this era) wants to sit back and wait for changes to happen and simply fall into their hands. Instead, everyone wants to prove that they too had a hand in it and that their lives were not in vain.

_

Hence the birth of Exôn, one of the many offshoots of the “Wings of Chaos”. Generated to hunt, steal and neutralize. Her body, focused solely on overcoming and adapting to a life at knifepoint.

What would it be like if you had the gift of killing from childhood? Exactly. You can't imagine it, but she... Well, she lived it every day.

_

Exôn isn't just a “weapon”, she thinks, feels, dreams, like all other living beings, she simply suppresses everything that might get in the way of her goals.

Her species is what we call a “Protogen”, a perfect blend of human mind, animal strength and machine lethality. Is there anything better than that? If so, that would be two of them, without a doubt.

_

_

A notes from Exôn:

“Look, darling... I'm not evil or a demon, I just do what I'm good at. Now, if what I do is really evil... He he he... that's beside the point.”

_
creator: X Event
